revision.comment: Changed protection settings for "[[Template:Module other]]": [[Wikipedia:High-risk templates|High-risk template or module]]: 3570 transclusions ([[User:MusikBot II/TemplateProtector|more info]]) ([Edit=Require extended confirmed access] (indefinite) [Move=Require extended confirmed access] (indefinite))

Changed protection settings for "[[Template:Module other]]": [[Wikipedia:High-risk templates|High-risk template or module]]: 3570 transclusions ([[User:MusikBot II/TemplateProtector|more info]]) ([Edit=Require extended confirmed access] (indefinite) [Move=Require extended confirmed access] (indefinite))

Changed protection settings for "[[Template:Module other]]": [[Wikipedia:High-risk templates|High-risk template or module]]: 3570 transclusions ([[User:MusikBot II/TemplateProtector|more info]]) ([Edit=Require extended confirmed access] (indefinite) [Move=Require extended confirmed access] (indefinite))
1 revision imported from [[:wikipedia:Template:Module_other]]: Mass importing wikipedia
1 revision imported: re-importing these templates since they seem to have broken
Imported from wikipedia at 2025-05-10 23:33:56 on [[Template:Module other]]
Reverted 1 edit by [[Special:Contributions/Tomlemonn|Tomlemonn]] ([[User talk:Tomlemonn|talk]]): Unhelpful change. ([[WP:TW|TW]])
Notifying of move discussion on [[Template talk:Main talk other#Requested move 18 November 2019 |Template talk:Main talk other]]
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{User:RMCD bot/subject notice|1=Template:Module or other|2=Template talk:Main talk other#Requested move 18 November 2019 }}
</noinclude>{{#switch:
  <!--If no or empty "demospace" parameter then detect namespace-->
  {{#if:{{{demospace|}}}
  | {{lc: {{{demospace}}} }}    <!--Use lower case "demospace"-->
  | {{#ifeq:{{NAMESPACE}}|{{ns:Module}}
    | module
    | other
    }}
  }}
| module = {{{1|}}}
| other
| #default = {{{2|}}}
}}<!--End switch--><noinclude>

{{documentation}}
<!-- Add categories to the /doc subpage, not here! -->
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was 1 revision imported: overwriting coordinates so I hope they start working
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
1 revision imported: Bot: reimport from enwiki to fix erroneous transclusions [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23208182735|commit triggered pipeline]]
